text: Add src/client/ApiEaseReadRequestClient.js as the canonical Node client for reading a single request by id.
goal: Implement apiease read, apiease update, and apiease delete as public CLI commands.
context: The existing create client already targets the versioned request resource under api/v1/resources/requests.
The public CRUD exercise in src/integration/ApiEasePublicCrudExercise.js already uses GET api/v1/resources/requests/:requestId for request reads.
steps: Implement a readRequest method that accepts apiBaseUrl, apiKey, shopDomain, and requestId.
Call the versioned request item endpoint with GET and the same authentication headers used by the create client.
Normalize JSON success responses, backend failures, transport failures, and non-JSON failures into the structured result shape already used by the CLI.
constraints: Keep HTTP transport behavior inside the client class and do not move CLI parsing into src/client.
Do not call the legacy programmatic requests endpoint.
acceptanceCriteria: The client issues GET requests to api/v1/resources/requests/<encoded requestId> using x-apiease-api-key and x-shop-myshopify-domain headers.
Successful JSON responses return the backend payload with status merged into the result object.
Transport errors and non-JSON responses return ok false results with machine-readable status, errorCode, message, and fieldErrors.
